text: Picking up groceries on the way home. Need anything else for tonight?
Just the focaccia from Fornax if you pass by. Frank wants it for Sunday.
Heading to Sunday dinner with the focaccia. Need me to swing by Dorchester first?
Frank wants the meatballs again. Will you grab the parsley?
On it. Picking up two bunches. See you at 2.
Made it through the case notes by 5. Driving up tomorrow morning, see you at Mom's.
Kevin has a spare Celtics ticket for Thursday. You want in?
Yes please. I owe Kevin a beer for the last one.
Sending photos of Biscuit at the dog park. He sat for a stranger today.
Game 5 Thursday 7:30 at TD. Section 312. Ashmont Tap after if they win.
I'm in. Pulling Scotty in too.
Forward clipping from 1911 is on your desk. Use it for the Triangle Shirtwaist DBQ.
Grievance draft is ready. Want me to send it over before Tuesday?
Send it tonight. I'll read it before the citywide meeting.
A1C update came in. Down to 7.4. Grandma is steady on the porch with the walker.
That's the best news I've heard this week. Thank you for staying on top of it. Sending the December check today.
BP at the morning check was 132 over 84. Holding steady on the Lisinopril 10mg.
Quick check on the Lexington trip permission slip count before the deadline.
Cleaning is on for Dec 17 at 2pm. Same chair as last time.
Confirmed, see you then.
Home by 6, grabbing bagels from Donut Depot in the morning.
Grandma's A1C is up a little, Aunt Louise says to call.
Celtics by 12 at the half, come over.
Biscuit walked, dinner's the pasta again.
Union meeting ran long, the position cuts have everyone rattled.
Marie just needs to vent tonight, not be fixed.
Dad's knees are bad again but he still won't do the surgery.
Rachel's on a late shift, I've got the dog.
Sunday sauce is on, come by after 2.
Scotty's late again, shocker.
Sending Grandma's care money to Louise today.
Bookstore run Saturday, want anything?
